items.quote: AzureEdge migrated our entire infrastructure in 90 days with zero downtime. The cost savings hit 42% in the first year — far exceeding our projections.
items.author: James Mitchell

items.quote: Their security team helped us achieve SOC 2 Type II compliance on Azure Sentinel in record time. We now sleep soundly knowing our cloud is protected 24/7.
items.author: Sarah Reynolds

items.quote: We went from deploying once a week to 20+ times a day. The AKS and Azure DevOps setup AzureEdge built is rock-solid. Game-changing for our product velocity.
items.author: Alex Kim

items.quote: The managed support team is exceptional — every P1 resolved within 15 minutes, every time. Our monthly health reports give us full visibility into our Azure spend and performance.
items.author: Linda Park
